principle: Source-authority-aware discipline build. Code/proofs/tests/config/runtime snapshots are primary for claims about behavior; docs/plans are secondary explanatory material unless explicitly describing current canonical policy.

tiers.label: Prior Shad drafts
tiers.note: Useful as drafts only; not canonical without verification.

conflictRule: If docs/plans conflict with code/proofs/tests/config, prefer code/proofs/tests/config and record the discrepancy.
